description: A manuscript which contains part of Yefet b. 'Eli's commentary on Numbers.  A colophon details its dedication to the "courtyard of Yosef b. Bakhtawayh ha-Melamed", a known qaraite figure in 10th century Jerusalem, by the late Sarah bt. Reuven, and her husband Moshe b. Yiftaḥ ha-Kohen al-Raḥbi. The manuscript is to be supervised by 'Azrya ha-Kohen ha-Maskil b. Maṣliaḥ Sahl, the grandson of the qaraite scholar Sahl b. Maṣliaḥ.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
